name: Miniature Seafood Quiches
recipeInstructions:
CRUST: Combine flour and salt. Using a pastry blender, cut in lard until the mixture resembles peas. Add vinegar and water, then continue cutting until well blended. Roll out on a lightly floured surface and cut to fit mini muffin pans. Line the pans with dough and fill with quiche mixture.
MIXTURE: Fill each tartlet about 3/4 full with shrimp, onion, and cheese (processed together). Beat mayonnaise, eggs, water, salt, and dill in a bowl until combined, then pour over the tartlets evenly. Bake quiches in an oven preheated to 400°F for 15-20 minutes, or until tops are puffy and golden brown. Makes 24 miniature appetizers or 12 mini cupcakes.
